info.name: Tempus AI
info.description: Tempus AI (NASDAQ: TEM) is a precision medicine company. As of this writing Tempus does not publish a self-serve, documented public developer API; its products (Lens, One, Hub, Next, ECG-AI, Pixel, xT/xR genomic profiling, Olivia) are delivered as enterprise and clinical SaaS via web apps and EHR integrations (HL7/FHIR). This Open Collection therefore contains no API endpoints and instead links the public product documentation. It will be expanded if Tempus publishes a documented public API.

request.description: Lens real-world multimodal data and agentic AI platform for life sciences. Licensed web application; no public API.
AI clinical assistant for oncology providers. No public API.
Smart physician platform for ordering tests and reviewing results. No public API.
AI-enabled care-gap identification. No public API.
HL7 / FHIR and batch EHR integration provisioned per partner. Not a public API.
DNA / RNA NGS assays for oncology. Results returned via Hub and EHR, not a public API.
